title: HushSpec Origins Extension v0
description: Schema for the HushSpec Origins extension. Declares origin-aware policy projection for multi-source agent workflows.

default_behavior.description: Behavior when no profile matches. "deny" blocks unmatched origins; "minimal_profile" proceeds under base policy.

profiles.description: Origin profiles, each with match criteria and policy overrides.

OriginProfile.description: An origin profile that narrows the base policy for matching requests.

posture.description: Initial posture state for this origin. Must reference a state in extensions.posture.states.

OriginMatch.description: Criteria for matching an incoming request to this profile.

provider.description: Source provider. Standard values: slack, teams, github, jira, email, discord, webhook, custom.

space_id.description: Channel, room, or repository identifier. Highest priority match field.

space_type.description: Type of space the request originated from.

visibility.description: Visibility level of the source space.

external_participants.description: Whether external participants are present in the source space.

tags.description: Tags that must ALL be present on the source (AND semantics).

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity classification of the source context.

actor_role.description: Role of the requesting actor (e.g., admin, member, guest).

ToolAccessRule.description: Tool access overrides for this origin. Composes with base rules.tool_access via intersection (allow) and union (block).

allow.description: Tool name allowlist. Intersected with base allowlist.

block.description: Tool name blocklist. Unioned with base blocklist.

require_confirmation.description: Tools requiring user/operator approval. Unioned with base list.

default.description: Default decision. If either base or origin specifies "block", effective default is "block".

max_args_size.description: Maximum argument payload size in bytes. The smaller of base and origin applies.

EgressRule.description: Egress overrides for this origin. Composes with base rules.egress via intersection (allow) and union (block).

allow.description: Domain allowlist. Intersected with base allowlist.

block.description: Domain blocklist. Unioned with base blocklist.

default.description: Default decision. If either base or origin specifies "block", effective default is "block".

DataPolicy.description: Data handling controls for this origin context.

allow_external_sharing.description: Whether content may be shared outside the origin context.

redact_before_send.description: Whether sensitive content must be redacted before output.

block_sensitive_outputs.description: Whether outputs containing sensitive patterns are blocked.

OriginBudgets.description: Budget overrides for this origin. The smaller of base and origin values applies.

egress_calls.description: Maximum number of outbound network requests.

shell_commands.description: Maximum number of shell command executions.

allow_cross_origin.description: Whether cross-origin data flow is permitted.

allowed_targets.description: Specific destinations permitted for cross-origin data flow.

require_approval.description: Whether cross-origin flows require user/operator approval.

BridgeTarget.description: A permitted destination for cross-origin data flow.

tags.description: Required tags on the target (AND semantics).

visibility.description: Required visibility level of the target.
